turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking a table at a restaurant ️ “Hi, I’d like to book a table for two tonight.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright! What time would you like the table for tonight?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, thanks. And under what name should I put the reservation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Vitória, please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, Vitória. And could I have a phone number to attach to the reservation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Number 3

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, so the number you gave is just “3” — could you give me the full phone number we should contact you on?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: This is my Numbers

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I see — but I’ll need the complete phone number so we can confirm the booking if needed. What’s the full number, please?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Lemes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, you said “Lemes,” but I still don’t have the actual phone number. Could you give me the full number we should call if anything changes?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 435465789 English Conversational Partner disse: Great, thanks. And do you have any seating preference for tonight — like indoors or outdoors?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Outdoor

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. And is this booking for any special occasion tonight, or just a regular dinner?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, loves’day

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Lovely, thanks for letting me know. Do you have any special requests for the evening, like allergies, decorations, or anything you’d like prepared?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please I would like decorations

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, we can arrange that. What kind of decorations would you like for the table?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes in the table

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, on the table — what style would you like? For example, flowers, candles, or something romantic?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Flowers, heart

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, flowers in a heart shape — that’s sweet. What color flowers would you like for the decoration?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, flowers and heart I want. Flowes white anda heart red

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, white flowers and a red heart — that’s clear. Do you or your guest have any food allergies or dietary restrictions I should note for the kitchen?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No English Conversational Partner disse: Alright, perfect. Do you have any menu preferences for tonight, or would you like to decide when you arrive?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I would like ask when I arrived

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, no problem — you can choose when you arrive. Will you be coming right at , or do you think you might get there a bit earlier or later?
